title: Start Up page: System Configuration command (Setup menu)
description:
Start Up page: System Configuration command (Setup menu)

[Setup]-[System Configuration]-[Startup]-[Start Mode] Page

From the Start Mode page, you can choose whether Epson RC+ 8.0 starts in Auto mode or Program mode.

Item	Description

Auto	Select
		 Auto to start Epson RC+ 8.0 in Auto mode.

		For more information, refer to Operation.

Program	Select
		 Program to start Epson RC+ 8.0 in Program mode.

		For more information, refer to Operation.

Password	Click
		 this button to change the password required to enter Program mode
		 from Operator mode when Epson RC+ 8.0 starts.
